emails.subject: Referral -- Brian Thompson | IVIG Home Infusion
emails.body_text:
Dear CareIG Intake Team,

I am referring my patient Brian Thompson (DOB: 06/22/1985) for home IVIG infusion therapy. Mr. Thompson has been diagnosed with Guillain-Barré Syndrome, ICD-10 G61.0, and requires Gamunex-C 10%, 40g every 4 weeks.

His insurance is UnitedHealthcare HMO. Member ID: UHC-2026-TH6221. Group: GRP44810.

Please find the attached referral packet including the letter of medical necessity, recent nerve conduction study, and progress note.

Best regards,
Lisa Brennan, MD
OrthoCare Florida
Tel: (954) 555-3100

emails.subject: Referral -- Sofia Martinez | IVIG Home Infusion
emails.body_text:
Dear CareIG Intake,

I am referring Sofia Martinez (DOB: 08/28/1990) for home IVIG infusion therapy. She has been diagnosed with Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID), ICD-10 D83.9, and I am prescribing Privigen 10%, 40g every 4 weeks.

Insurance: BlueCross BlueShield PPO. Member ID: BCBS-7741-MA0828. Group: GRP59012.

Please note that Ms. Martinez has indicated she may need financial assistance. Her copay estimate is significant and she has requested information about patient assistance programs.

Referral packet attached.

Sincerely,
Alan Whitfield, MD
Miami Allergy & Immunology
Tel: (305) 555-6140

emails.subject: RE: [PA REQUEST] CareIG | Williams | MemberID: AET-5519-WI0314 | Drug: Hizentra 20% | Dose: 10g | Dx: D80.6
emails.body_text:
Dear CareIG Specialty Pharmacy,

This letter is to inform you that the prior authorization request for the member identified below has been DENIED.

Member: Robert Williams
Member ID: AET-5519-WI0314
PA Reference: AET-PACONF-20260312-29047
Drug Requested: Hizentra 20%
Denial Reason: Insufficient clinical documentation; prior IVIG trial history not provided (CARC: PI-204)

You may submit a Level 1 appeal within 30 calendar days of this notification. Please include additional clinical documentation supporting the medical necessity of the requested therapy.

Aetna Prior Authorization Department

emails.subject: CareIG -- Consent Form Required | Vasquez
emails.body_text:
Dear Ms. Vasquez,

Thank you for speaking with us today. As discussed, CareIG Specialty Pharmacy will be coordinating your home IVIG infusion therapy as prescribed by Dr. Harrington.

Before we can proceed with your benefits verification and prior authorization, we need your signed consent form on file. Please find the consent form attached to this email.

You may complete the form by:
1. Printing, signing, and scanning/photographing the document, then replying to this email with the signed copy attached.
2. Using the e-signature link included in the attached PDF.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to call us at (305) 555-0122 or reply to this email.

Warm regards,
Teresa Rodriguez
Patient Representative
CareIG Specialty Pharmacy
Tel: (305) 555-0122

emails.subject: Re: CareIG -- Consent Form Required | Vasquez
emails.body_text:
Good morning,

Please find the signed consent form attached. I signed and scanned it this morning.

Thank you for your help. Please let me know if you need anything else.

Maria Vasquez

emails.subject: CareIG -- Formulary Exception Letter Needed | Vasquez, Maria Elena | Aetna PPO
emails.body_text:
Dear Dr. Harrington,

I am writing regarding your patient Maria Elena Vasquez (DOB: 03/15/1971, Member ID: AET847392018).

During our benefits verification, we identified that Privigen is not on the Aetna PPO formulary. The formulary-preferred IVIG products for this plan are: Gammaplex, Octagam, Gammagard S/D, Gammagard Liquid, Gamunex-C, Hizentra, and HyQvia.

In order to proceed with the prior authorization for Privigen, we will need a formulary exception letter from your office. The letter should include:

1. Clinical rationale for why the patient specifically requires Privigen over the formulary alternatives
2. Documentation of any prior trials and failures of formulary-covered products
3. Any clinical contraindications to the formulary alternatives

Ms. Vasquez's referral notes indicate previous trials of Gamunex-C and Octagam with documented adverse effects. A letter referencing these details would strengthen the exception request.

If you could provide this letter at your earliest convenience, we can include it with the PA submission package. Please reply to this email or fax to (305) 555-0199.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Priya Nair
Benefits Verification Specialist (Lead)
CareIG Specialty Pharmacy
Tel: (305) 555-0120
Fax: (305) 555-0199

emails.subject: Re: CareIG -- Formulary Exception Letter Needed | Vasquez, Maria Elena | Aetna PPO
emails.body_text:
Priya,

Thank you for bringing this to my attention. I have prepared the formulary exception letter documenting Ms. Vasquez's prior treatment history with Gamunex-C and Octagam and the clinical rationale for Privigen.

The signed letter is attached. Please let me know if any revisions are needed or if there is additional documentation I can provide to support the PA.

Best,
James T. Harrington, MD
